name: uxmeas-insights
description: Astro 5 build for uxmeas.com /insights/* — content collections with MDX, RSS, sitemap. Builds into ../insights/ at the portfolio repo root.

scripts.build: node scripts/check-calendar.mjs && astro build && node scripts/cleanup-output.mjs
scripts.clean: rm -rf .astro node_modules/.astro ../insights && echo '[insights:clean] caches and output cleared'
